title: Decode Meshtastic Position packets into local-client location provider
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-zte2.4 identified MESHTASTIC_PORTNUM_POSITION_APP as the compatibility app path for injected locations, but the Meshtastic adapter currently treats Position packets as unsupported. What needs to be done: add a decoded Position packet kind and adapter operation, parse position payload metadata, map it to local-client location semantics through the app-interface/HAL bridge or directly to lichen_hal_location_sample, and add native_sim/qemu adapter/gateway tests proving Position packets update lichen_hal_location_time_snapshot_get().
notes:
Implementation evidence 2026-07-02:
- Added Meshtastic POSITION_APP handling in the shared adapter: new appended public packet kind, position snapshot, stats field, and handle_location callback; parser decodes Position latitude_i fixed32, longitude_i fixed32, altitude int32 varint, time fixed32, timestamp fixed32, and sats_in_view varint.
- Conservative semantics: require valid lat/lon for accepted Position packets; set local-client fix state to 3D when altitude is present, otherwise 2D; prefer timestamp field 7 over time field 4 when both are present; ignore oversized sats_in_view rather than rejecting an otherwise valid Position; leave location_source/altitude_source and accuracy/epoch policy to follow-up.
- Gateway Meshtastic adapter maps accepted Position packets through lichen_app_interface_submit_location() as LOCAL_CLIENT, preserving session epoch checks before mutation.
- Removed POSITION_APP portnum 3 from the advertised unsupported-operation table/portnum test while keeping the old unsupported enum value allocated for compatibility.
- Added shared adapter ztests for full Position dispatch/status, no location hook unsupported, hook error unsupported, malformed Position payloads, negative altitude, oversized satellites ignored, and updated unsupported portnum coverage.
- Added gateway adapter ztests proving Position packets update lichen_hal_location_time_snapshot_get() as local-client, minimal lat/lon gives 2D, negative altitude gives 3D and propagates -17m, and malformed Position packets return queue status res=3 without replacing a seeded HAL snapshot.
- Created child project-LICHEN-zte2.7.1 for remaining Meshtastic Position semantics: upstream schema/accuracy fields, field 4 vs 7 policy, source/altitude source mapping, and build/provision epoch or staleness policy for accepted timestamps.

Review evidence:
- Explorers Ohm/Bohr mapped current ToRadio->adapter path, existing Position field numbers, HAL/app-interface bridge, and no-hardware tests.
- Initial code reviews: Maxwell clean for gateway bridge/tests; Peirce P2 found missing negative-altitude coverage and missing epoch/staleness policy tracking; Chandrasekhar P2 found public API field insertion risks and oversized sats_in_view rejection.
- Fixes: added negative-altitude adapter and gateway tests, updated zte2.7.1 to include build/provision epoch or staleness policy, appended new enum/ops/packet_info/stats fields, ignored oversized sats_in_view optional field, removed portnum 3 from unsupported-portnum test, and trimmed gateway malformed table to fake queue capacity.
- Post-fix reviews: Euclid clean for gateway bridge/tests; Godel clean and verified protocol follow-up; Feynman clean for final public API/header shape after appending packet_info/stats fields. git diff --check: pass.

EC2/Twister evidence:
- Builder i-0a4ef8856a64aba36 in us-east-2a with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr. Local host did not have /mnt/lichen-zephyr/scripts/aws-builder-user-data.sh before EBS attach, so Ubuntu builder was launched and EBS bootstrap was run after mount. bootstrap-host.sh failed on Ubuntu Noble because apt package awscli has no candidate, but the EBS Zephyr env was usable; installed missing host packages gcc/g++/make then gcc-multilib/g++-multilib/libc6-dev-i386 to satisfy native_sim -m32 host builds.
- Failed/partial runs: twister-out-zte2-7a exposed missing gcc, stale unsupported portnum 3 test, and fake FromRadio queue-capacity issue; twister-out-zte2-7b passed qemu_x86 but native_sim lacked multilib headers; twister-out-zte2-7c passed after multilib before final header formatting/field-order tweak.
- Final command in /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-zte2-7-validate: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --outdir twister-out-zte2-7d --inline-logs --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen
- Final result: 3 scenarios / 6 instances selected; 4 configs passed, 2 static skipped, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings in 103.28s; 224 test cases executed, 80 skipped on 2 of total 12 platforms.
- Final size twister-out-zte2-7d: native_sim meshtastic_adapter text=118837 data=1593 bss=40430 dec=160860; native_sim meshtastic_gateway_adapter text=260077 data=7315 bss=75304 dec=342696; qemu_x86 meshtastic_adapter text=152848 data=6908 bss=115392 dec=275148; qemu_x86 meshtastic_gateway_adapter text=221236 data=8280 bss=155072 dec=384588.
- Final config gates: meshtastic_adapter native/qemu have CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_ADAPTER=y and CONFIG_LICHEN_HAL=y, app-interface unset; gateway native has CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_BLE=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAL=y, test surface unset; gateway qemu has CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_GATEWAY_ADAPTER_TEST_SURFACE=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE=y, CONFIG_LICHEN_HAL=y, CONFIG_NET_L2_DUMMY=y.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware scope: Meshtastic POSITION_APP packets now decode into local-client location snapshots through the app-interface/HAL bridge, with native_sim/qemu adapter and gateway tests proving accepted Position updates HAL and malformed payloads do not replace prior snapshots. Remaining protocol metadata/epoch policy is tracked in child project-LICHEN-zte2.7.1.
